COE.objective: Reduce MCP tool-schema surface area without breaking contracts.
steps: Inventory ``mcp/server.json`` + ``~/.cursor/mcp.json`` tool counts and serialized size.
Flag servers whose manifest JSON exceeds ~2000 tokens **after** local measurement (do not claim ratios without benchmarks).
Design ``get_tool_schema`` / ``invoke_tool`` shim (mcp-compressor-class) behind a feature flag.
defer: Rootless ``execute_script`` sandbox is a separate threat-model + CI harness — not implied here.

SIE.objective: Improve swarm coordination and shared durable context.
steps: Prefer existing Atomadic skills (``uep-swarm-advanced``, ``recon-codebase``) for topology picks.
If adding memX-class service: container image, auth, schema — ship behind explicit env + rollback.
defer: AdaptOrch / SAMEP names are integration targets — cite design docs before production claims.

steps: Run tier-safe recon (``map_terrain`` / ``phase0_recon``) scoped to repo root.
defer: Neo4j / LanceDB / DeepWiki-class hosts require infra tickets — keep local JSON/ SQLite MVP first.

TEE.objective: Observable swarm + MCP behavior with human-gated auto-fixes.
steps: Define OTel resource attributes + span names in ``.ass-ade/aso/telemetry_metrics.schema.json``.
Export counters/histograms for MCP ``tools/call`` latency and token estimates where instrumented.
Route regressions to ``/epiphany`` + ``@evolutionary-manager`` with rollback + tests.
defer: AgentOps / Phoenix dashboards — wire after collector is running in CI or local compose.
